description: Report paired light as fulfilled after the canonical exorcism instead of still awaiting prayer

replacements.old:
<TELL "- Paired light: ">
	<COND (,XC <TELL "answered and awaiting the spoken prayer">)
replacements.new:
<TELL "- Paired light: ">
	<COND (,LLD-FLAG <TELL "fulfilled and released">)
	      (,XC <TELL "answered and awaiting the spoken prayer">)
